_comment: Default mob flee entity lists for the Civil mod.
Add or override JSON files under data/<namespace>/civil_mob_flee_entities/.
Shape matches civil_spawn_gate_entities, but SEMANTICS DIFFER:
whitelist — entity types that never receive civilization flee goals (bypass).
blacklist — entity types that receive flee goals even when not MONSTER category,
if the mob is a PathfinderMob (same flee behavior as hostile mobs).
If the same entity id appears in both lists, whitelist wins.
Files load in lexicographic order; later files add to the merged sets.
Set replace: true on a file to clear all entries loaded from earlier files.
Default whitelist includes vanilla raid wave mob types so Raids are not undermined by flee goals.
